query:
SELECT a.name as atoll, p.name as island, p.slug
FROM places p
JOIN atolls a ON p.atollId = a.id
WHERE p.type = 'island' AND a.name NOT IN ('Baa Atoll')
ORDER BY a.name, p.name;
